name: On the Impact of Paul Otellini's CEO Years at Intel (Kastner Blog Preview)
description: Second-draft Kastner blog preview of the Otellini analysis, posted April 19, 2013 — two days after the 'How the IT Industry Changed' preview (copy-4) and nine days before the Tech.pinions publication. Retitled to match the final Tech.pinions headline; content substantially similar to the April 17 draft. Preserves Kastner's iterative publishing workflow: blog-draft → blog-refinement → Tech.pinions publication. Related studies: otellini-preview-how-it-changed-2013-604cfb (earlier draft), otellini-intel-techpinions-2013-917213 (published version).
